description: Beyond the Veil Patch 2 (14 December 2022) — Mists Changes (anonymity, tiers, travel), Roads of Avalon Changes, Season 16 Statues, Season 18 Changes, Crystal Arena, Travel Changes, Combat Balance Changes (Arcane Staffs, Axes, Crossbows, Daggers, Fire Staffs, Holy Staffs, Maces, Spears, Swords, Helmets, Armors, Capes, Potions), Fixes.

sections.heading: Mists Changes
items: Players in the Mists and Greater Mists now show as "Mysterious Stranger" to other players not in their party. Local chat (Say, Emote) also conceals identity. Certain UI options are disabled. Identity is disclosed when inviting to group (Greater Mists only) or upon death.

Enchanted Mists now have increased chance of leading to higher-tier zones: Uncommon leads T6 66.67% / T7 33.33%; Rare leads T6 40% / T7 53.33% / T8 6.67%; Epic leads T7 75% / T8 25%; Legendary leads T8 100%
Higher-tier Mythical creatures more likely to spawn in higher-tier regions
Loot and Silver bonuses in Mists regions now match those in the Open World (~11.11% increase)
Upgrade distribution of enemies in the Mists increased (~12.6% more Fame, loot, and Silver)
Brecilien Portals: 25% → 0% in Common Lethal; 0% → 10% in Uncommon+ Lethal
Unstable Roads Portals now connect to Open World (not Roads), significantly increasing connection chances to Outlands and Royal Continent
Fast Travel with luggage allowed to/from Brecilien at same cost as non-adjacent Royal Continent cities
Brecilien portals visible when Brecilien is unlocked, rather than after reaching the city
Arcane Spiderlings only appear on minimap in close proximity
Skulls (player deaths) no longer display on the map in lethal Mists zones
sections.searchable_text: Mists anonymity Mysterious Stranger Greater Mists party identity death Enchanted higher-tier Uncommon Rare Epic Legendary T6 T7 T8 Mythical Silver loot Open World 11.11% 12.6% Brecilien Portals Unstable Roads Fast Travel luggage Spiderlings minimap Skulls lethal

sections.heading: Roads of Avalon Changes
items: Roaming mobs in Roads of Avalon respawn more quickly
One-third of chest spawns in Roads upgraded from Group to Raid level (mobs upgraded from Veteran to Elite); chest rewards increased accordingly
Focus Fire protection for mobs: Champion and below: 8+ players; Miniboss and above: 21+ players
Avalonian Knight: Fixed random knockbacks; Performs more attacks between spells; Shield knockback blocked by immunities
Avalonian Warrior — Shatter: Removed CC; Added defense reduction vs. mobs; Reduced heal reduction duration: 12s → 6s
Avalonian Spellweaver: Increased downtime between beam casts
Pathfinder Heavy Drone: Fixed Windwall chaining CC; Stuns and knockbacks now blocked by immunities
Avalonian Archer: Reduced stun duration of Melee knockback and Silencing Shot
Avalonian Monk: Significantly reduced knockback distance and time for Monks in Roads camps
Previous bonuses returned to Static Randomized Dungeons in the Roads
Increased number of incoming portals in Raid zones from 2 to 4
Avalonian chests in the Roads are now protected by the entire camp
Fixed issue where Group Random Dungeon maps could not be used in Hideout zones within the Roads
sections.searchable_text: Roads of Avalon roaming mobs respawn chest Group Raid Veteran Elite Focus Fire Champion Miniboss Avalonian Knight Warrior Shatter Spellweaver Pathfinder Heavy Drone Archer Monk knockback Static Randomized Dungeons portals Raid zones Hideout zones

sections.heading: Season 16 Winner Statues
sections.description: The statue for Season 16 winners Sex & Flex is now visible in Conquerors' Hall, along with logos of second-place War Gods and third-place Hood and Scythe. Season 16 furniture items are now placeable.
sections.searchable_text: Season 16 Sex and Flex War Gods Hood and Scythe Conquerors Hall statue furniture

sections.heading: Season 18 Changes
sections.description: Albion's 18th Guild Season starts on December 17. Shorter than a standard season with Reset/Invasion Days every 3 weeks. Players must be a member of the qualifying guild for at least 75% of the season.
items: Crystal Spiders give more Season Points with lower Might thresholds, and their loot doubled
Crystal Spider Might: Level 1: 10,000 → 3,000; Level 2: 25,000 → 7,500
Crystal Spider Season Points: Level 1: 20 → 30; Level 2: 30 → 45
sections.searchable_text: Season 18 December 17 Reset Invasion Days 3 weeks 75% Crystal Spiders Season Points Might Level 1 10000 3000 Level 2 25000 7500 20 30 30 45 loot doubled

sections.heading: Crystal Arena
items: New Crystal Arena Avatar Rings added as guaranteed drops for reaching Crystal, Gold I, and Silver I ranks
Crystal Arena victories now give slightly more Rank Points (Gold IV and Crystal ranks not affected)
sections.searchable_text: Crystal Arena Avatar Rings Crystal Gold I Silver I guaranteed drop Rank Points victories

sections.heading: Travel Changes
items: Journey Back: When traveling to any island, sets destination to the city that island belongs to; Journey Back now available on islands (teleporting to attached city is free); can also be used to escape islands belonging to other players

Fast Travel to a Royal City (or Portal Town) from a Rest or Outlands Hideout gives a debuff that causes loss of Home location if a Black Zone is entered; Fast Traveling back to the Hideout removes this debuff; entering a Royal City on foot does not apply the debuff; does not apply to Roads Hideouts
sections.searchable_text: Travel Changes Journey Back island city Home binding Royal City Portal Town Rest Outlands Hideout debuff Black Zone foot Roads Hideouts

sections.heading: Other Changes and Improvements
items: In Corrupted Dungeons, Sword, Spear, and Dagger Q-slot abilities no longer stack on Watchers, Crystals, Mephits, or Hidden Treasures
Player reports now show character's most recent chat messages when reported from chat window
Fey Artifacts have Fast Travel costs and can be salvaged for Relics
Improved Marketplace search function
Guild crest is now previewed in the main Guild Creation UI
Pre-existing Loadouts can now be duplicated via a button on the UI
sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Corrupted Dungeons Q-slot Watchers Crystals Mephits Hidden Treasures player reports chat Fey Artifacts Fast Travel Relics Marketplace Guild crest Loadouts duplicate

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs removed passive Aggressive Caster new passive Ascended second-slot ability uninterruptible 1.5s

changes.raw_text: Removed the passive Aggressive Caster. Added new passive: Ascended — activates when weapon's second-slot ability is cast; makes all casts and channels uninterruptible for 1.5s.
notes: Added new passive: Ascended — activates when weapon's second-slot ability is cast; makes all casts and channels uninterruptible for 1.5s

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Boulder Toss (Hellfire Hands) audio spam has been mitigated
Fixed issue where Mighty Blow (Broadsword) would not hit when enemy was sprinting away from caster
Mythical Web (Duskweaver Armor) now only removes movement buffs
Various display/UI fixes including Real Estate duration, party invite equipment display, name tag issues, Alliance emblem, Guild Finder optional stats
Fixed issue where option to skip full zones from character selection screen was not available
Fixed issue where some crafting recipes cost slightly less Focus than intended
Fixed issue where Crystals in Corrupted Dungeons could drop loot
[Mobile] Multiple fixes for re-mounting, spell rotation targeting, equipment/Item Power display, target marker arrow
Additional graphical, animation, UI, audio, terrain, and localization fixes
